category_sources: Official homepage says MP3Gain analyzes and adjusts MP3 files losslessly: https://mp3gain.sourceforge.net/
source_facts.description: Lossless mp3 normalizer with statistical analysis
docs_sources: Official SourceForge files page provides official releases/source downloads: https://sourceforge.net/projects/mp3gain/files/mp3gain/
Official homepage is the best available official documentation surface: https://mp3gain.sourceforge.net/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control project URL was confirmed; official SourceForge page provides release/source files rather than a source-control URL
tags_sources: Official homepage explains MP3Gain adjusts MP3 loudness losslessly without decoding/re-encoding: https://mp3gain.sourceforge.net/
